summary: Iter 59 — Contracts persistence + history view. Backend: 20/20 pytest PASS (auth gating, validation 404s, projection excludes signatures, filters by car_id/customer_id/type, single-GET includes base64, soft-delete + LIST exclusion, cross-org isolation via fresh signup, MongoDB indexes present, no _id leaks, list endpoint <1.5s). Frontend: full e2e flow PASS — VehicleCard dropdown 'Sözleşme Geçmişi' opens ContractHistoryModal (empty state initially); creating contract via Download triggers POST /api/contracts (fire-and-forget, no UI block, file downloaded); reopen history shows new row; reprint opens popup with rebuilt HTML + GET /api/contracts/<id>; delete confirms and removes row + DELETE /api/contracts/<id>. All 17/17 acceptance criteria from review_request validated.
passed_tests: POST /api/contracts creates doc with org_id partition, customer_name + car_plate + car_label snapshot
GET /api/contracts list response EXCLUDES seller_signature + buyer_signature (only has_seller_signature/has_buyer_signature boolean flags)
GET /api/contracts/<id> returns FULL doc INCLUDING seller_signature + buyer_signature base64
DELETE /api/contracts/<id> soft-deletes; subsequent GET 404; LIST excludes
Cross-org isolation: fresh-signup org sees zero overlap with primary org contracts; direct GET returns 404
Frontend: VehicleCard dropdown 'Sözleşme Geçmişi' visible at data-testid=contract-history-<carId>
Frontend: Click → opens ContractHistoryModal (data-testid=contract-history-modal); empty state shows data-testid=contract-history-empty
Frontend: contract-download-btn fires <a download> AND fires POST /api/contracts (fire-and-forget); UI not blocked
Frontend: Reopen history → new row appears (data-testid=contract-history-row-<id>) with type badge, plate, customer name
Frontend: contract-history-reprint-<id> fires GET /api/contracts/<id> + opens popup window with title 'Araç Satış Sözleşmesi - <PLATE>-<no>'
Frontend: contract-history-delete-<id> → window.confirm accept → DELETE /api/contracts/<id>; row disappears + sonner toast 'Sözleşme silindi'
critical_code_review_comments: contracts.py is clean: org_id partition on every query, soft-delete via deleted={'$ne':True}, projection-based exclusion of base64 in list (≈ massive perf win for orgs with hundreds of contracts), proper Pydantic validators with Literal type discrimination.
ensure_indexes() called from startup with idempotent create_index — verified live indexes via Mongo introspection.

ContractHistoryModal: load() memoized via useCallback with [isOpen, car?.id, customer?.id] deps + eslint-disable. Reprint correctly fetches full doc (with signatures) on demand — avoids carrying base64 in list. handleDelete uses window.confirm (acceptable for v1; can be upgraded to AlertDialog later).
ContractModal persistContract is fire-and-forget — print/download UX never blocks on network. Network test confirmed POST sent in parallel with download trigger.

Minor: contracts.py response_model serialization uses manual dict comprehension `{k: doc.get(k) for k in ContractFull.model_fields if k in doc}` — Pydantic v2 model_validate(doc) would be more idiomatic, but current approach is safe & explicit.
Minor: no pagination cursor (skip/offset) on GET /api/contracts — currently capped at limit=500. For large orgs (>500 contracts/year) consider date-range or cursor pagination in a future iter.

Minor: car_label snapshot stores 'brand model' but NOT year — for older fleet ('2018 Renault Megane') the year would help reprint context. Currently year is not stored on contract doc; reprint pulls from carDoc which may be deleted later.
seed_data_creation: Backend test fixtures create 3 contracts (kapora/delivery/sale) + 1 delete-test contract under primary org, then teardown deletes them. Cross-org test registers a fresh user iter59_cross_<uuid>@test.com (left in DB — minimal footprint, no resources owned).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter 59 = contracts persistence + history view. Endpoints: POST /api/contracts (returns full doc), GET /api/contracts?car_id=&customer_id=&type=&limit= (projection excludes seller_signature/buyer_signature, returns has_*_signature bool flags), GET /api/contracts/<id> (full doc), DELETE /api/contracts/<id> (soft). Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_contracts_iter59.py (20 tests, 5s runtime). Frontend selectors: vehicle-menu-<id> → contract-history-<id> opens contract-history-modal with contract-history-empty / contract-history-list / contract-history-row-<id> / contract-history-reprint-<id> / contract-history-delete-<id> / contract-history-loading. Reprint opens popup (page.expect_event('popup')). Delete uses window.confirm — auto-accept dialog event. Fire-and-forget persistence: clicking contract-download-btn or contract-print-btn in ContractModal silently POSTs /api/contracts in parallel (no toast on persist). Mongo collection: contracts; indexes verified live.
rca of the issue: N/A — all features working as designed; zero blocking bugs.
